titles.title: We've Got the Power in the Name of Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Give me your hand, Let's agree together, Then all of our enemies will crumble at our feet, For whatever we bind on earth, Shall be bound in Heaven; At the Name of Jesus, Satan has to flee.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: (Yes) We've got the power in the Name of Jesus, We've got the power in the Name of the Lord, Though Satan rages, We cannot be defeated; 'Cause we've got the power in the Name of the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So many years now, Satan tried to stop us, But the Bride of Jesus, Lord, is still alive; Like a mighty army, We'll be marchin' onward, Winning every battle, 'Cause the Lord's on our side.
